title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core of read, write, edit, and bash commands, extensible through npm and git packages. It supports multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering customizable prompt templates and skills without the cost constraints of frontier models.
